_meta.regulatory_basis: EU Reg. 853/2004 Annex III, Section IX, Chapter II, point 3

nodes.name: Webhook — MonsterMQ HTST Under-Pasteurization
nodes._comment: MonsterMQ Flow rule: on topic DairyPlant/Process/Pasteurizer/HTST-01/Status/temperature_C < 71.5 AND hold_time_s > 0 → HTTP POST. Throttle: max 1 trigger per 5 sec per HTST unit.

nodes.name: MongoDB — Sensor context laatste 10 min
nodes._comment: Snapshot van alle HTST tags (temperature_C, divert_position, hold_time_s, regen_efficiency_pct) voor de audit-record.

nodes.name: MonsterMQ — Open divert valve (automated)
nodes._comment: PRIMARY automated-action. Sub-second response — happens BEFORE audit-record + Teams push. Closed-loop verified by PLC echoing divert_position back to /Status topic.

nodes.name: MongoDB — Write audit-record (5y retention)
nodes._comment: warehouse.htst_audit — append-only, retention enforced via collection TTL = 1825 days (5 jaar EU 853/2004 vereist).

parameters.bodyParametersJson: ={ "@type": "MessageCard", "summary": "HTST under-pasteurization divert SOLVE-A", "themeColor": "D32F2F", "sections": [ { "activityTitle": "🚨 HTST onder-pasteurisatie — batch {{ $json.batch_id }} divert", "facts": [ {"name":"Min temp","value":"{{ $json.min_temp_C_10min }}°C"}, {"name":"Regulatoire grens","value":"{{ $json.regulatory_threshold_C }}°C"}, {"name":"Divert-duur","value":"{{ $json.divert_duration_sec }} sec"}, {"name":"Min regen-eff","value":"{{ $json.min_regen_eff_pct }}%"}, {"name":"Likely root cause","value":"{{ $json.likely_root_cause }}"}, {"name":"Ack voor","value":"{{ $json.ack_deadline }}"} ] } ], "potentialAction": [ { "@type": "HttpPOST", "name": "Acknowledge — heb gezien", "target": "http://n8n:5678/webhook/dairy/htst-divert/ack?batch={{ $json.batch_id }}&action=acknowledge" }, { "@type": "HttpPOST", "name": "Escaleer plant-directeur", "target": "http://n8n:5678/webhook/dairy/htst-divert/ack?batch={{ $json.batch_id }}&action=escalate" } ] }
